    1. ControlRoom(float, float)

Class ControlRoom

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Entity
model.entity.detectable.Detectable
model.entity.detectable.Interactable
model.entity.detectable.entities.ControlRoom
public class ControlRoom extends Interactable
ControlRoom is basically an Interactable that represents an entrance that the Player need have a full pass to get access into and winning the game.
